
### `docs/05_pharmacy_guide.md`

```markdown
# Pharmacy Guide

Pharmacy data covers prescriptions, dispenses, drug identifiers, and pharmacy claims.

## Standards

| Standard | Purpose |
|---|---|
| NDC | Drug product/package identifier |
| RxNorm | Normalized clinical drug vocabulary |
| NCPDP | Pharmacy claim and e-prescribing transactions |

## Generated Files

```text
data/generated/pharmacy/ndc_reference.csv
data/generated/pharmacy/rxnorm_reference.csv
data/generated/pharmacy/ncpdp_pharmacy_claim.json
data/generated/pharmacy/ncpdp_script_new_rx.json
